title: adenostegia pilosa var. bolanderi
intro: Adenostegia pilosa var. bolanderi is a perennial plant species, a variant of the Adenostegia pilosa, native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of compounds like sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Adenostegia pilosa var. bolanderi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Adenostegia pilosa var. bolanderi can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to its potential interactions with other medications.
